# cloudflare_origin_cloud_region (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cloudflare_origin_cloud_region" "example_origin_cloud_region" {
  zone_id = "023e105f4ecef8ad9ca31a8372d0c353"
  origin_ip = "192.0.2.1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `origin_ip` (String)
- `zone_id` (String) Identifier.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `modified_on` (String) Time this mapping was last modified.
- `region` (String) Cloud vendor region identifier.
- `vendor` (String) Cloud vendor hosting the origin.
Available values: "aws", "azure", "gcp", "oci".
